title: helichrysum gymnocephalum
intro: Helichrysum gymnocephalum, also known as the yellow mountain or mountain everlast, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. Helichrysum gymnocephalum can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, and essential oils, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
